Home Jobs

Product Designer

Northwind is a small but fast-growing company building tools for independent makers, and we are looking for a Product Designer who can own the end-to-end experience of our flagship product. You will partner closely with engineering and product to turn ambiguous problems into clear, usable interfaces that customers love.

In this role you will lead design for major initiatives, from early discovery and research through high-fidelity execution and hand-off. You will be responsible for maintaining and evolving our design system, running usability studies with real customers, and shaping the overall visual language of the product as it matures.

We expect you to have several years of experience designing and shipping digital products, a strong portfolio that demonstrates craft and systems thinking, and the ability to communicate your decisions clearly to technical and non-technical stakeholders alike. Experience with motion design or front-end code is a welcome bonus.

Northwind is fully remote across European time zones. We offer competitive compensation, generous equipment budgets, and a calm, asynchronous culture that respects deep work and personal time away from the keyboard.

Northwind Inc. All rights reserved.
